problems.details: Save/sync-related graph does not appear to write any obvious runtime state before syncing.
problems.why_it_matters: A save/sync graph does not appear to write state before syncing.
problems.likely_impact: Persisted state may drift from runtime state.
problems.suggested_fix: Confirm whether state is already current; otherwise write state before sync.

problems.why_it_matters: This node is reporting an explicit editor/runtime error state.
problems.likely_impact: The graph may fail to compile or behave incorrectly at runtime.
problems.suggested_fix: Open the graph, inspect the node error, and fix the broken connection, invalid reference, or missing asset.

problems.details: Graph contains 48 nodes and may be too large.
problems.why_it_matters: Large graphs are harder to debug, reason about, and safely refactor.
problems.likely_impact: Higher chance of regression, duplicated logic, and unreadable flow.
problems.suggested_fix: Split the graph into smaller functions by responsibility.

problems.details: Graph writes or uses index/selection-like state but no branch/switch validation was detected.
problems.why_it_matters: Numeric or index-like state appears used without visible validation.
problems.likely_impact: May cause out-of-range or invalid selection issues.
problems.suggested_fix: Confirm index bounds/validity before using it in flow or selection.
